schema.description: GA4GH Workflow Execution Service capability metadata for this Platform deployment.

additionalProperties.description: Supported version information for a specific workflow type.

workflow_type_version.description: Array of supported version strings for the workflow type.

additionalProperties.title: WorkflowTypeVersion

workflow_type_versions.description: Map of supported workflow type names to their supported version lists.

supported_wes_versions.description: Array of supported GA4GH WES specification versions.

supported_filesystem_protocols.description: Array of supported filesystem protocols such as `http`, `https`, `sftp`, `s3`, `gs`, `file`, or `synapse`.

workflow_engine_versions.description: Map of workflow engine names to engine version strings.

items.description: Default workflow engine parameter exposed by the GA4GH WES service.
items.title: DefaultWorkflowEngineParameter

default_workflow_engine_parameters.description: Array of default workflow engine parameters exposed by the WES service.

system_state_counts.description: Map of workflow run states to the number of runs currently in each state.

auth_instructions_url.description: URL containing human-readable instructions for obtaining an authorization token for this WES endpoint.

contact_info_url.description: URL or `mailto:` contact for reporting problems or security issues with this WES endpoint.

tags.description: Key-value map of extended metadata returned by the WES service.

schema.title: WesServiceInfo
